name: Boy Toy
overview: When Den, a massage boy saves Sem a boy toy from the killer, their relationship is not good. Sem is interested in Den's stubbornness and kisses. They deepen their relationship day by day and change anger into love. When that happens, hidden secrets start to show.

trailers.title: Trailer - ប៊យ ថយ Boy Toy | Exclusive Series | Sastra Film App
